para_trans: Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - 1. Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and Government
The Prevention of Delay in the discharge of Duties Act, 2005
General Administration Department Notification No. SRV-2021 No.49 / Works-
Revenue and Forest Department, Government Order No. TRF-0626 / Q. No. 140/1
Regulation of transfers and discharge of government duties of Maharashtra Government employees.
Subs. pursuant to the provisions of sections 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005
The following officers of the Collector's cadre have been terminated from their deputation and placed before their names:
Column No. In the position shown in 4, the reference No. Appointment under the Government Order of 3.
However, due to administrative reasons, the said order is hereby stayed till further orders of the Government.
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
